# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** Third-party scripts: analytics scripts use async/defer
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:52.619Z
**OWASP Category:** API8:2023 - Security Misconfiguration

## Description

Analytics scripts use async/defer and do not block page load.

## Why this result

Passed because Analytics scripts use async/defer and do not block page load.
